applicable_situations: Defective goods sold to a consumer
Deficient service in telecom, banking, insurance, e-commerce, or healthcare
Misleading advertisement causing loss to a consumer
forum: District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (up to rupees 1 crore) / State Commission (1-10 crore) / National Commission (above 10 crore)
limitation_period_note: Complaint must be filed within 2 years from the date the cause of action arose; condonation possible for sufficient cause.
procedural_steps: Send a written notice to the seller or service provider stating the defect or deficiency
File complaint before the appropriate Consumer Commission with the prescribed fee
Commission issues notice; opposite party files reply within 30 days
Hearing and order; appeal within 30-45 days to the next-tier commission
required_documents: Photographs or other evidence of defect / deficiency
Copy of notice sent to the opposite party
